Our Collection

Islamic Heritage
Every design carries Pakistani and Islamic culture — wear your faith with pride.
Premium Cotton
100% pure export-quality cotton — soft, durable, and breathable. Quality guaranteed.
Fast Delivery
Same-day in Lahore. 2–3 days doorstep delivery across all of Pakistan.
Cash on Delivery
COD, JazzCash, EasyPaisa — whatever works for you. No advance payment required.
Our Story

Lahore se Duniya Tak

Labbaik Wear is a Lahori dream — a brand that merges Pakistani identity and Islamic values with modern streetwear to create something entirely new.

Our shirts are not just fabric. They are a statement. They say we love our language, our faith, and our land. Every piece is crafted with export-quality cotton, infused with the rich heritage of Lahore.

Order via WhatsApp
